description: Machine-readable research program backlog. Each entry represents a structured deep-research item. The planner reads this alongside backlog.md and can use focus_keys to compose v2 multi-focus tasks.

items.title: Cold-Phase Recovery — 3-Focus Deep Research
items.objective: Investigate cold-phase patterns across three structured focuses: cold-phase strategy variants, hybrid entry timing, and distribution bias exploitation.
statistical_requirements: perm_p < 0.05 on cold-phase edge vs baseline
McNemar test on hybrid vs cold-phase entry classification
chi-squared p < 0.05 for distribution bias claim
items.notes: Triggered when COLD_REGIME confidence >= 0.6. Covers C/D/H focus areas from external research protocol.

items.title: Cold-Phase Baseline Recovery (Single Focus Fallback)
items.objective: When 3-focus research fails or is blocked, fall back to baseline cold-phase strategy generation and validation.
statistical_requirements: perm_p < 0.05 on cold-phase edge vs baseline
items.notes: Fallback item. Only activate if cold_regime_3focus repeatedly fails.

items.title: Signal Saturation — 3-Focus Analysis
items.objective: Analyze SIGNAL_SATURATED state across signal quality filtering, shadow strategy promotion, and execution policy tightening.
statistical_requirements: perm_p < 0.05 on filtered vs unfiltered edge
Shadow strategy drawdown at 5th Monte Carlo percentile < 15%
McNemar test on policy-tightened entry classification

items.title: Orchestrator Stability Audit
items.objective: Audit the orchestrator planner/worker loop for stale task handling, cooldown accuracy, and gate regression coverage.
